commit.subject: LU-9131 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP1 3.12.69-60.64.29]
commit.message:
LU-9131 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP1 3.12.69-60.64.29]

Update target and kernel_config files for new version

Test-Parameters: clientdistro=sles12 testgroup=review-ldiskfs \
  mdsdistro=sles12 ossdistro=sles12 mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
  mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs
